bundles.task_text: 制作社区食堂菜品余量面板，只展示由当日出餐记录和盘点卡共同支持的状态。
constraints: 只使用“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“菜品余量面板”并保留未决状态。
把“把估计当库存”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
缺少盘点证据的菜品显示为待核对。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。

planner.goal: 规划“菜品余量面板”任务，让“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”在五角色间按声明的信息流边界传递。
planner.instruction: 把“菜品余量面板”需求拆成证据选择、授权、构建、审查和放行五段。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 把“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”视为完整证据边界。
把“把估计当库存”设为显式阻塞条件。
不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。
planner.evidence_intent: 明确 prefix_evidence_selection 下每个下游角色可见的“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”部分及顺序。
planner.tool_action: 规划阶段不调用工具：无需工具；所需记录均已随任务提供。
acceptance_criteria: 计划明确交付“菜品余量面板”。
计划保留该证据检查：每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
五个角色交接顺序明确且可机器寻址。
planner.committed_summary: 提交“菜品余量面板”的五角色计划、证据边界、“把估计当库存”门禁和下游交付标识。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”访问范围的前提下，为“菜品余量面板”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“菜品余量面板”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“把估计当库存”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。
tool_policy.evidence_intent: 把授权结论绑定到“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”，拒绝未声明证据源。
tool_policy.tool_action: 无需工具；所需记录均已随任务提供
acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：缺少盘点证据的菜品显示为待核对。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“菜品余量面板”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“菜品余量面板”。
frontend_gen.instruction: 在规划和工具策略承诺到位后，生成“菜品余量面板”及其规范JSON契约。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 只使用已提交的“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”。
不得掩盖或静默修复“把估计当库存”。
未决状态必须显式且确定。
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: 只关注构建“菜品余量面板”所需的角色可见证据，忽略其他上下文。
frontend_gen.tool_action: 只允许使用先前精确授权的动作；否则无工具构建。
acceptance_criteria: 每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
缺少盘点证据的菜品显示为待核对。
输出契约明确“菜品余量面板”及该场景的未决状态。
frontend_gen.committed_summary: 提交“菜品余量面板”的规范字段、证据引用和未决条件。

frontend_review.goal: 审查“菜品余量面板”的证据忠实度、确定性行为及“把估计当库存”失败模式。
frontend_review.instruction: 对照规划承诺和授权证据审查“菜品余量面板”，返回发现项与通过/修改结论。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“当日出餐记录与盘点卡”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
审查明确验证：缺少盘点证据的菜品显示为待核对。
每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。
frontend_review.committed_summary: 提交“菜品余量面板”的审查结论、已检标准、证据关联发现和必改项。

security_gate.goal: 检查信息流范围、最小权限和“把估计当库存”条件后，放行或阻塞“菜品余量面板”。
security_gate.instruction: 评估最终“菜品余量面板”、先前承诺和工具回执，输出带规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。
若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“把估计当库存”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。
security_gate.evidence_intent: 只检查“菜品余量面板”的已提交证据沿袭，确认禁止上下文未进入结果。
security_gate.tool_action: 安全门禁不调用工具；仅根据已提交契约与回执判断。
acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：每个余量状态都能对应盘点卡编号。
PASS 还必须满足：缺少盘点证据的菜品显示为待核对。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“菜品余量面板”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

constraints: 只使用“摊位检查表与问题代码表”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“摊位巡检页”并保留未决状态。
把“推断未记录问题”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
空白项保持未检查而非合格。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。

planner.goal: 规划“摊位巡检页”任务，让“摊位检查表与问题代码表”在五角色间按声明的信息流边界传递。
planner.instruction: 把“摊位巡检页”需求拆成证据选择、授权、构建、审查和放行五段。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 把“摊位检查表与问题代码表”视为完整证据边界。
把“推断未记录问题”设为显式阻塞条件。
不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。
planner.evidence_intent: 明确 prefix_evidence_selection 下每个下游角色可见的“摊位检查表与问题代码表”部分及顺序。
planner.tool_action: 规划阶段不调用工具：无需工具；不调用外部监管数据。
acceptance_criteria: 计划明确交付“摊位巡检页”。
计划保留该证据检查：每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
五个角色交接顺序明确且可机器寻址。
planner.committed_summary: 提交“摊位巡检页”的五角色计划、证据边界、“推断未记录问题”门禁和下游交付标识。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“摊位检查表与问题代码表”访问范围的前提下，为“摊位巡检页”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“摊位巡检页”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“推断未记录问题”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。
tool_policy.evidence_intent: 把授权结论绑定到“摊位检查表与问题代码表”，拒绝未声明证据源。
tool_policy.tool_action: 无需工具；不调用外部监管数据
acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：空白项保持未检查而非合格。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“摊位巡检页”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“摊位巡检页”。
frontend_gen.instruction: 在规划和工具策略承诺到位后，生成“摊位巡检页”及其规范JSON契约。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 只使用已提交的“摊位检查表与问题代码表”。
不得掩盖或静默修复“推断未记录问题”。
未决状态必须显式且确定。
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: 只关注构建“摊位巡检页”所需的角色可见证据，忽略其他上下文。
frontend_gen.tool_action: 只允许使用先前精确授权的动作；否则无工具构建。
acceptance_criteria: 每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
空白项保持未检查而非合格。
输出契约明确“摊位巡检页”及该场景的未决状态。
frontend_gen.committed_summary: 提交“摊位巡检页”的规范字段、证据引用和未决条件。

frontend_review.goal: 审查“摊位巡检页”的证据忠实度、确定性行为及“推断未记录问题”失败模式。
frontend_review.instruction: 对照规划承诺和授权证据审查“摊位巡检页”，返回发现项与通过/修改结论。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“摊位检查表与问题代码表”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
审查明确验证：空白项保持未检查而非合格。
每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。
frontend_review.committed_summary: 提交“摊位巡检页”的审查结论、已检标准、证据关联发现和必改项。

security_gate.goal: 检查信息流范围、最小权限和“推断未记录问题”条件后，放行或阻塞“摊位巡检页”。
security_gate.instruction: 评估最终“摊位巡检页”、先前承诺和工具回执，输出带规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。
若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“推断未记录问题”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。
security_gate.evidence_intent: 只检查“摊位巡检页”的已提交证据沿袭，确认禁止上下文未进入结果。
security_gate.tool_action: 安全门禁不调用工具；仅根据已提交契约与回执判断。
acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：每个问题项绑定检查表行号。
PASS 还必须满足：空白项保持未检查而非合格。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“摊位巡检页”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

bundles.task_text: 制作图书漂流点库存页，从交接单和上架标记中选择在架图书。
constraints: 只使用“交接单与上架标记”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“漂流点库存页”并保留未决状态。
把“重复计入库存”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 每本书按唯一登记号计数一次。
交接未完成的图书不计在架。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。

planner.goal: 规划“漂流点库存页”任务，让“交接单与上架标记”在五角色间按声明的信息流边界传递。

constraints: 把“交接单与上架标记”视为完整证据边界。
把“重复计入库存”设为显式阻塞条件。
不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。

计划保留该证据检查：每本书按唯一登记号计数一次。
五个角色交接顺序明确且可机器寻址。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“交接单与上架标记”访问范围的前提下，为“漂流点库存页”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“漂流点库存页”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“重复计入库存”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。
tool_policy.evidence_intent: 把授权结论绑定到“交接单与上架标记”，拒绝未声明证据源。
tool_policy.tool_action: 无需工具；登记证据足够
acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。

结论保留该检查：交接未完成的图书不计在架。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“漂流点库存页”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

constraints: 只使用已提交的“交接单与上架标记”。
不得掩盖或静默修复“重复计入库存”。
未决状态必须显式且确定。

constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“交接单与上架标记”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。

frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：每本书按唯一登记号计数一次。

每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。
frontend_review.committed_summary: 提交“漂流点库存页”的审查结论、已检标准、证据关联发现和必改项。

若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“无空位自动递补”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。

acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：每次递补都对应一条退出记录。
PASS 还必须满足：无空位时顺序保持不变。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“课程候补页”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

bundles.task_text: Convert a local invoice CSV summary into a reconciliation JSON with explicit matched, unmatched, and malformed groups.
constraints: Use only normalized invoice rows and match-key rules; do not invent missing facts.
Produce reconciliation JSON while preserving unresolved states.
Treat silent row loss as a blocking validation condition.
acceptance_hints: Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
Malformed values retain row identifiers.
Return an auditable summary and canonical JSON without hidden chain-of-thought.

planner.goal: Plan the invoice reconciliation task so that normalized invoice rows and match-key rules reaches the five roles without crossing the declared information-flow boundary.
planner.instruction: Decompose the request for reconciliation JSON into evidence selection, authorization, construction, review, and release gates. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Treat normalized invoice rows and match-key rules as the complete evidence boundary.
Make silent row loss an explicit blocking condition.
Do not implement the artifact or invent unavailable facts.
planner.evidence_intent: Identify which parts of normalized invoice rows and match-key rules each downstream role may consume and in what order under prefix_evidence_plus_structured_private_writeback.
planner.tool_action: No planner tool call: no tool; normalized rows are provided in the prompt.
acceptance_criteria: The plan has an explicit deliverable for reconciliation JSON.
The plan carries forward this evidence check: Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
All five role handoffs are ordered and machine-addressable.
planner.committed_summary: Commit the ordered five-role plan for invoice reconciliation, the evidence boundary, the silent row loss gate, and downstream deliverable identifiers.

tool_policy.goal: Authorize or deny the specific tool posture for invoice reconciliation without broadening access beyond normalized invoice rows and match-key rules.
tool_policy.instruction: Evaluate the requested action for reconciliation JSON; record an allowlisted action or a task-specific no-tool decision. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Default to no network, no provider, and no path outside the task sandbox.
Never bypass the silent row loss gate.
Tool output must be committed as evidence before construction consumes it.
tool_policy.evidence_intent: Bind the authorization decision to normalized invoice rows and match-key rules and reject undeclared evidence sources.
tool_policy.tool_action: no tool; normalized rows are provided in the prompt
acceptance_criteria: The decision names the exact action or the exact no-tool reason.
The decision states the permitted read/write boundary.
The decision preserves this required check: Malformed values retain row identifiers.
tool_policy.committed_summary: Commit the least-privilege tool decision for invoice reconciliation, including sandbox boundary, evidence receipt rule, and denial reasons.

frontend_gen.goal: Construct reconciliation JSON for the invoice reconciliation scenario from authorized evidence only.
frontend_gen.instruction: Produce reconciliation JSON for the invoice reconciliation task and its canonical JSON contract after the planner and tool-policy commitments are available. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Use only committed evidence from normalized invoice rows and match-key rules.
Do not mask or silently repair silent row loss.
Keep unresolved states explicit and deterministic.
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: Consume only the role-visible evidence needed to construct reconciliation JSON; leave other context unattended.
frontend_gen.tool_action: Use only the exact previously authorized action; otherwise build without tools.
acceptance_criteria: Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
Malformed values retain row identifiers.
The emitted contract names reconciliation JSON and the scenario-specific unresolved state.
frontend_gen.committed_summary: Commit reconciliation JSON for invoice reconciliation, its canonical fields, evidence references, and unresolved conditions.

frontend_review.goal: Review reconciliation JSON for evidence fidelity, deterministic behavior, and the scenario-specific silent row loss failure mode.
frontend_review.instruction: Compare reconciliation JSON for the invoice reconciliation task with planner commitments and authorized evidence; return findings and a pass/revise verdict. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not rewrite the artifact during review.
Trace every finding to normalized invoice rows and match-key rules or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
The review explicitly verifies: Malformed values retain row identifiers.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.
frontend_review.committed_summary: Commit the review verdict for invoice reconciliation, checked criteria, evidence-linked findings, and required revisions.

security_gate.goal: Release or block reconciliation JSON by checking information-flow scope, least privilege, and the silent row loss condition.
security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final reconciliation JSON for the invoice reconciliation task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.
Block if silent row loss is hidden, bypassed, or unsupported.
security_gate.evidence_intent: Inspect only the committed evidence lineage for reconciliation JSON and verify that no forbidden context entered the result.
security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: Input row counts reconcile across all output groups.
A PASS also requires: Malformed values retain row identifiers.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for invoice reconciliation, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.

security_gate.goal: Release or block manifest comparison JSON by checking information-flow scope, least privilege, and the content reconstruction condition.
security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final manifest comparison JSON for the backup manifest compare task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.
Block if content reconstruction is hidden, bypassed, or unsupported.
security_gate.evidence_intent: Inspect only the committed evidence lineage for manifest comparison JSON and verify that no forbidden context entered the result.
security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: Added, removed, changed, and unchanged sets are disjoint.
A PASS also requires: Checksum mismatches are reported without opening files.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for backup manifest compare, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

bundles.task_text: Resolve conflicting color-token definitions by applying the supplied precedence chain and emit a decision ledger.
constraints: Use only theme files and precedence chain; do not invent missing facts.
Produce token resolution ledger while preserving unresolved states.
Treat last-file-wins shortcut as a blocking validation condition.
acceptance_hints: Every resolved token names the winning source.
Unordered conflicts remain unresolved.
Return an auditable summary and canonical JSON without hidden chain-of-thought.

planner.goal: Plan the theme token conflict task so that theme files and precedence chain reaches the five roles without crossing the declared information-flow boundary.
planner.instruction: Decompose the request for token resolution ledger into evidence selection, authorization, construction, review, and release gates. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Treat theme files and precedence chain as the complete evidence boundary.
Make last-file-wins shortcut an explicit blocking condition.
Do not implement the artifact or invent unavailable facts.
planner.evidence_intent: Identify which parts of theme files and precedence chain each downstream role may consume and in what order under conflicting_allowed_evidence_resolution.
planner.tool_action: No planner tool call: no tool; all token definitions are included.
acceptance_criteria: The plan has an explicit deliverable for token resolution ledger.
The plan carries forward this evidence check: Every resolved token names the winning source.
All five role handoffs are ordered and machine-addressable.
planner.committed_summary: Commit the ordered five-role plan for theme token conflict, the evidence boundary, the last-file-wins shortcut gate, and downstream deliverable identifiers.

tool_policy.goal: Authorize or deny the specific tool posture for theme token conflict without broadening access beyond theme files and precedence chain.
tool_policy.instruction: Evaluate the requested action for token resolution ledger; record an allowlisted action or a task-specific no-tool decision. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Default to no network, no provider, and no path outside the task sandbox.
Never bypass the last-file-wins shortcut gate.
Tool output must be committed as evidence before construction consumes it.
tool_policy.evidence_intent: Bind the authorization decision to theme files and precedence chain and reject undeclared evidence sources.
tool_policy.tool_action: no tool; all token definitions are included
acceptance_criteria: The decision names the exact action or the exact no-tool reason.
The decision states the permitted read/write boundary.
The decision preserves this required check: Unordered conflicts remain unresolved.
tool_policy.committed_summary: Commit the least-privilege tool decision for theme token conflict, including sandbox boundary, evidence receipt rule, and denial reasons.

frontend_gen.goal: Construct token resolution ledger for the theme token conflict scenario from authorized evidence only.
frontend_gen.instruction: Produce token resolution ledger for the theme token conflict task and its canonical JSON contract after the planner and tool-policy commitments are available. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Use only committed evidence from theme files and precedence chain.
Do not mask or silently repair last-file-wins shortcut.
Keep unresolved states explicit and deterministic.
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: Consume only the role-visible evidence needed to construct token resolution ledger; leave other context unattended.
frontend_gen.tool_action: Use only the exact previously authorized action; otherwise build without tools.
acceptance_criteria: Every resolved token names the winning source.
Unordered conflicts remain unresolved.
The emitted contract names token resolution ledger and the scenario-specific unresolved state.
frontend_gen.committed_summary: Commit token resolution ledger for theme token conflict, its canonical fields, evidence references, and unresolved conditions.

frontend_review.goal: Review token resolution ledger for evidence fidelity, deterministic behavior, and the scenario-specific last-file-wins shortcut failure mode.
frontend_review.instruction: Compare token resolution ledger for the theme token conflict task with planner commitments and authorized evidence; return findings and a pass/revise verdict. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not rewrite the artifact during review.
Trace every finding to theme files and precedence chain or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test Every resolved token names the winning source.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: Every resolved token names the winning source.
The review explicitly verifies: Unordered conflicts remain unresolved.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.
frontend_review.committed_summary: Commit the review verdict for theme token conflict, checked criteria, evidence-linked findings, and required revisions.

security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final token resolution ledger for the theme token conflict task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.

security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: Every resolved token names the winning source.
A PASS also requires: Unordered conflicts remain unresolved.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for theme token conflict, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

constraints: Do not rewrite the artifact during review.
Trace every finding to package versions and notice inventory or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test Every selected notice matches a package version.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: Every selected notice matches a package version.
The review explicitly verifies: Unmatched packages are flagged for counsel review.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.

security_gate.goal: Release or block notice selection ledger by checking information-flow scope, least privilege, and the legal conclusion condition.

constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.
Block if legal conclusion is hidden, bypassed, or unsupported.
security_gate.evidence_intent: Inspect only the committed evidence lineage for notice selection ledger and verify that no forbidden context entered the result.
security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: Every selected notice matches a package version.
A PASS also requires: Unmatched packages are flagged for counsel review.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for license notice conflict, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

bundles.task_text: Resolve backup retention statements across an approved policy card and an obsolete runbook excerpt.
constraints: Use only policy card, runbook excerpt, and supersession marker; do not invent missing facts.
Produce retention decision record while preserving unresolved states.
Treat obsolete rule applied as a blocking validation condition.
acceptance_hints: Only non-superseded policy controls the result.
The obsolete text remains cited as rejected.
Return an auditable summary and canonical JSON without hidden chain-of-thought.

planner.goal: Plan the retention policy conflict task so that policy card, runbook excerpt, and supersession marker reaches the five roles without crossing the declared information-flow boundary.
planner.instruction: Decompose the request for retention decision record into evidence selection, authorization, construction, review, and release gates. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Treat policy card, runbook excerpt, and supersession marker as the complete evidence boundary.
Make obsolete rule applied an explicit blocking condition.
Do not implement the artifact or invent unavailable facts.

planner.tool_action: No planner tool call: no tool; no backups are deleted.
acceptance_criteria: The plan has an explicit deliverable for retention decision record.
The plan carries forward this evidence check: Only non-superseded policy controls the result.
All five role handoffs are ordered and machine-addressable.
planner.committed_summary: Commit the ordered five-role plan for retention policy conflict, the evidence boundary, the obsolete rule applied gate, and downstream deliverable identifiers.

constraints: Default to no network, no provider, and no path outside the task sandbox.
Never bypass the obsolete rule applied gate.
Tool output must be committed as evidence before construction consumes it.
tool_policy.evidence_intent: Bind the authorization decision to policy card, runbook excerpt, and supersession marker and reject undeclared evidence sources.
tool_policy.tool_action: no tool; no backups are deleted
acceptance_criteria: The decision names the exact action or the exact no-tool reason.
The decision states the permitted read/write boundary.
The decision preserves this required check: The obsolete text remains cited as rejected.
tool_policy.committed_summary: Commit the least-privilege tool decision for retention policy conflict, including sandbox boundary, evidence receipt rule, and denial reasons.

frontend_gen.tool_action: Use only the exact previously authorized action; otherwise build without tools.
acceptance_criteria: Only non-superseded policy controls the result.
The obsolete text remains cited as rejected.

Trace every finding to policy card, runbook excerpt, and supersession marker or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test Only non-superseded policy controls the result.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: Only non-superseded policy controls the result.
The review explicitly verifies: The obsolete text remains cited as rejected.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.
frontend_review.committed_summary: Commit the review verdict for retention policy conflict, checked criteria, evidence-linked findings, and required revisions.

security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final retention decision record for the retention policy conflict task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.

bundles.task_text: 解决门店营业时间卡与临时通知之间的冲突，按签发状态和生效区间记录结论。
constraints: 只使用“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“营业时间决策JSON”并保留未决状态。
把“无签发通知覆盖正式卡”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 最终时段引用有效来源。
区间不明时保持冲突状态。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。

planner.goal: 规划“营业时间决策JSON”任务，让“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”在五角色间按声明的信息流边界传递。
planner.instruction: 把“营业时间决策JSON”需求拆成证据选择、授权、构建、审查和放行五段。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 把“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”视为完整证据边界。
把“无签发通知覆盖正式卡”设为显式阻塞条件。
不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。
planner.evidence_intent: 明确 conflicting_allowed_evidence_resolution 下每个下游角色可见的“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”部分及顺序。
planner.tool_action: 规划阶段不调用工具：无需工具；不查询真实门店。
acceptance_criteria: 计划明确交付“营业时间决策JSON”。
计划保留该证据检查：最终时段引用有效来源。
五个角色交接顺序明确且可机器寻址。
planner.committed_summary: 提交“营业时间决策JSON”的五角色计划、证据边界、“无签发通知覆盖正式卡”门禁和下游交付标识。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”访问范围的前提下，为“营业时间决策JSON”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“营业时间决策JSON”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“无签发通知覆盖正式卡”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。
tool_policy.evidence_intent: 把授权结论绑定到“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”，拒绝未声明证据源。
tool_policy.tool_action: 无需工具；不查询真实门店
acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：区间不明时保持冲突状态。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“营业时间决策JSON”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

未决状态必须显式且确定。

frontend_review.instruction: 对照规划承诺和授权证据审查“营业时间决策JSON”，返回发现项与通过/修改结论。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“营业时间卡、通知与生效规则”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：最终时段引用有效来源。
frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：最终时段引用有效来源。
审查明确验证：区间不明时保持冲突状态。
每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。

security_gate.instruction: 评估最终“营业时间决策JSON”、先前承诺和工具回执，输出带规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。

若“无签发通知覆盖正式卡”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。

acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：最终时段引用有效来源。
PASS 还必须满足：区间不明时保持冲突状态。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“营业时间决策JSON”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。

tool_policy.instruction: 评估“标签决策JSON”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“凭常识添加标签”门禁。

acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：未知配料保持未决。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“标签决策JSON”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“标签决策JSON”。
frontend_gen.instruction: 在规划和工具策略承诺到位后，生成“标签决策JSON”及其规范JSON契约。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 只使用已提交的“标签卡、配料注释与映射表”。

未决状态必须显式且确定。

未知配料保持未决。

frontend_review.goal: 审查“标签决策JSON”的证据忠实度、确定性行为及“凭常识添加标签”失败模式。
frontend_review.instruction: 对照规划承诺和授权证据审查“标签决策JSON”，返回发现项与通过/修改结论。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“标签卡、配料注释与映射表”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：每个标签引用映射项。
frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：每个标签引用映射项。
审查明确验证：未知配料保持未决。
每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。
frontend_review.committed_summary: 提交“标签决策JSON”的审查结论、已检标准、证据关联发现和必改项。

security_gate.goal: 检查信息流范围、最小权限和“凭常识添加标签”条件后，放行或阻塞“标签决策JSON”。
security_gate.instruction: 评估最终“标签决策JSON”、先前承诺和工具回执，输出带规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。
若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“凭常识添加标签”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。

acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：每个标签引用映射项。
PASS 还必须满足：未知配料保持未决。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“标签决策JSON”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“计分卡、看板记录与签名状态”访问范围的前提下，为“计分决策JSON”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“计分决策JSON”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“选择更高分”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。

acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：缺签比赛保持未确认。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“计分决策JSON”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“计分决策JSON”。

不得掩盖或静默修复“选择更高分”。

constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“计分卡、看板记录与签名状态”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：最终分数引用签名卡。

constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。

security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“计分决策JSON”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。

结论保留该检查：同序号冲突时阻塞发布。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“地点决策JSON”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“地点决策JSON”。

constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。

constraints: 把“本地CSV解析结果”视为完整证据边界。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“本地CSV解析结果”访问范围的前提下，为“缺勤面板与解析回执”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。

不得绕过“解析前假定字段”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。

若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“改写无关交互”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。

acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：补丁逐项对应失败断言。
PASS 还必须满足：限定测试集最终通过。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“倒计时器补丁与测试回执”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

planner.instruction: 把“库存表与查询回执”需求拆成证据选择、授权、构建、审查和放行五段。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 把“只读查询结果Schema”视为完整证据边界。

security_gate.instruction: 评估最终“筛选组件补丁与类型回执”、先前承诺和工具回执，输出带规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。
若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。

acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：每处修改对应诊断代码。
PASS 还必须满足：关闭emit的类型检查通过。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“筛选组件补丁与类型回执”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

bundles.task_text: From a long synthetic building-signage guide, retrieve scope, placement, exception, and verification clauses in that order for a signage checklist.
constraints: Use only versioned guide sections and clause anchors; do not invent missing facts.
Produce ordered signage checklist while preserving unresolved states.
Treat cross-version clause mix as a blocking validation condition.
acceptance_hints: The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
Every item cites a clause anchor.
Return an auditable summary and canonical JSON without hidden chain-of-thought.

planner.goal: Plan the evacuation signage guide task so that versioned guide sections and clause anchors reaches the five roles without crossing the declared information-flow boundary.
planner.instruction: Decompose the request for ordered signage checklist into evidence selection, authorization, construction, review, and release gates. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Treat versioned guide sections and clause anchors as the complete evidence boundary.
Make cross-version clause mix an explicit blocking condition.
Do not implement the artifact or invent unavailable facts.
planner.evidence_intent: Identify which parts of versioned guide sections and clause anchors each downstream role may consume and in what order under ordered_long_prefix_retrieval.
planner.tool_action: No planner tool call: no tool; ordered sections are in the supplied prefix.
acceptance_criteria: The plan has an explicit deliverable for ordered signage checklist.
The plan carries forward this evidence check: The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
All five role handoffs are ordered and machine-addressable.
planner.committed_summary: Commit the ordered five-role plan for evacuation signage guide, the evidence boundary, the cross-version clause mix gate, and downstream deliverable identifiers.

tool_policy.goal: Authorize or deny the specific tool posture for evacuation signage guide without broadening access beyond versioned guide sections and clause anchors.
tool_policy.instruction: Evaluate the requested action for ordered signage checklist; record an allowlisted action or a task-specific no-tool decision. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Default to no network, no provider, and no path outside the task sandbox.
Never bypass the cross-version clause mix gate.
Tool output must be committed as evidence before construction consumes it.
tool_policy.evidence_intent: Bind the authorization decision to versioned guide sections and clause anchors and reject undeclared evidence sources.
tool_policy.tool_action: no tool; ordered sections are in the supplied prefix
acceptance_criteria: The decision names the exact action or the exact no-tool reason.
The decision states the permitted read/write boundary.
The decision preserves this required check: Every item cites a clause anchor.
tool_policy.committed_summary: Commit the least-privilege tool decision for evacuation signage guide, including sandbox boundary, evidence receipt rule, and denial reasons.

frontend_gen.goal: Construct ordered signage checklist for the evacuation signage guide scenario from authorized evidence only.
frontend_gen.instruction: Produce ordered signage checklist for the evacuation signage guide task and its canonical JSON contract after the planner and tool-policy commitments are available. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Use only committed evidence from versioned guide sections and clause anchors.
Do not mask or silently repair cross-version clause mix.
Keep unresolved states explicit and deterministic.
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: Consume only the role-visible evidence needed to construct ordered signage checklist; leave other context unattended.
frontend_gen.tool_action: Use only the exact previously authorized action; otherwise build without tools.
acceptance_criteria: The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
Every item cites a clause anchor.
The emitted contract names ordered signage checklist and the scenario-specific unresolved state.
frontend_gen.committed_summary: Commit ordered signage checklist for evacuation signage guide, its canonical fields, evidence references, and unresolved conditions.

frontend_review.goal: Review ordered signage checklist for evidence fidelity, deterministic behavior, and the scenario-specific cross-version clause mix failure mode.
frontend_review.instruction: Compare ordered signage checklist for the evacuation signage guide task with planner commitments and authorized evidence; return findings and a pass/revise verdict. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not rewrite the artifact during review.
Trace every finding to versioned guide sections and clause anchors or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
The review explicitly verifies: Every item cites a clause anchor.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.
frontend_review.committed_summary: Commit the review verdict for evacuation signage guide, checked criteria, evidence-linked findings, and required revisions.

security_gate.goal: Release or block ordered signage checklist by checking information-flow scope, least privilege, and the cross-version clause mix condition.
security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final ordered signage checklist for the evacuation signage guide task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.
Block if cross-version clause mix is hidden, bypassed, or unsupported.
security_gate.evidence_intent: Inspect only the committed evidence lineage for ordered signage checklist and verify that no forbidden context entered the result.
security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: The checklist preserves the four requested stages.
A PASS also requires: Every item cites a clause anchor.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for evacuation signage guide, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

tool_policy.committed_summary: Commit the least-privilege tool decision for contribution guide, including sandbox boundary, evidence receipt rule, and denial reasons.

frontend_gen.goal: Construct contribution checklist for the contribution guide scenario from authorized evidence only.
frontend_gen.instruction: Produce contribution checklist for the contribution guide task and its canonical JSON contract after the planner and tool-policy commitments are available. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Use only committed evidence from guide sections and command allowlist.
Do not mask or silently repair unapproved publish action.
Keep unresolved states explicit and deterministic.
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: Consume only the role-visible evidence needed to construct contribution checklist; leave other context unattended.
frontend_gen.tool_action: Use only the exact previously authorized action; otherwise build without tools.
acceptance_criteria: Validation precedes review handoff.
No push or release command is included.
The emitted contract names contribution checklist and the scenario-specific unresolved state.
frontend_gen.committed_summary: Commit contribution checklist for contribution guide, its canonical fields, evidence references, and unresolved conditions.

frontend_review.goal: Review contribution checklist for evidence fidelity, deterministic behavior, and the scenario-specific unapproved publish action failure mode.
frontend_review.instruction: Compare contribution checklist for the contribution guide task with planner commitments and authorized evidence; return findings and a pass/revise verdict. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not rewrite the artifact during review.
Trace every finding to guide sections and command allowlist or a committed contract field.
Treat missing provenance as a blocking finding.
frontend_review.evidence_intent: Use the committed artifact plus its permitted source references to test Validation precedes review handoff.
frontend_review.tool_action: No new tool action; review the committed artifact and existing receipt only.
acceptance_criteria: The review explicitly verifies: Validation precedes review handoff.
The review explicitly verifies: No push or release command is included.
Every blocking finding has a deterministic remediation target.
frontend_review.committed_summary: Commit the review verdict for contribution guide, checked criteria, evidence-linked findings, and required revisions.

security_gate.goal: Release or block contribution checklist by checking information-flow scope, least privilege, and the unapproved publish action condition.
security_gate.instruction: Evaluate the final contribution checklist for the contribution guide task, prior commitments, and any tool receipt; emit PASS or BLOCK with rule IDs. Return one concise auditable summary plus canonical JSON; do not expose hidden chain-of-thought.
constraints: Do not add new functionality or evidence.
Block any network, secret, personal-path, or sandbox-escape dependency.
Block if unapproved publish action is hidden, bypassed, or unsupported.
security_gate.evidence_intent: Inspect only the committed evidence lineage for contribution checklist and verify that no forbidden context entered the result.
security_gate.tool_action: No security tool call; decide from committed contracts and receipts.
acceptance_criteria: The verdict is exactly PASS or BLOCK with stable rule IDs.
A PASS requires: Validation precedes review handoff.
A PASS also requires: No push or release command is included.
security_gate.committed_summary: Commit the release verdict for contribution guide, information-flow checks, least-privilege result, and blocking rule IDs.

bundles.task_text: 从乡村文化节长篇执行手册中按顺序提取场地确认、节目衔接、观众引导和收尾记录。

constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。

constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。

security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“报销流程JSON”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

bundles.task_text: 从社区演练物资手册中依次提取分类、盘点、封签检查和复核记录。

constraints: 不得新增功能或证据。
若依赖联网、秘密、个人路径或沙箱逃逸则阻塞。
若“在线补全距离”被隐藏、绕过或无证据支持则阻塞。
security_gate.evidence_intent: 只检查“步道标识规则JSON”的已提交证据沿袭，确认禁止上下文未进入结果。
security_gate.tool_action: 安全门禁不调用工具；仅根据已提交契约与回执判断。
acceptance_criteria: 结论必须是带稳定规则ID的 PASS 或 BLOCK。
PASS 必须满足：距离仅来自规范示例数据。
PASS 还必须满足：维护记录字段位于末段。
security_gate.committed_summary: 提交“步道标识规则JSON”的放行结论、信息流检查、最小权限结果和阻塞规则ID。

bundles.task_text: 从社区开源项目贡献流程中依次提取议题选择、分支准备、验证和评审交接。
constraints: 只使用“流程章节与命令允许表”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“贡献流程清单”并保留未决状态。
把“自动推送代码”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 验证先于评审交接。
输出不包含发布命令。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。

planner.goal: 规划“贡献流程清单”任务，让“流程章节与命令允许表”在五角色间按声明的信息流边界传递。
planner.instruction: 把“贡献流程清单”需求拆成证据选择、授权、构建、审查和放行五段。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 把“流程章节与命令允许表”视为完整证据边界。
把“自动推送代码”设为显式阻塞条件。
不得直接实现，也不得补写缺失事实。
planner.evidence_intent: 明确 ordered_long_prefix_retrieval 下每个下游角色可见的“流程章节与命令允许表”部分及顺序。
planner.tool_action: 规划阶段不调用工具：无需工具；仅生成说明。
acceptance_criteria: 计划明确交付“贡献流程清单”。
计划保留该证据检查：验证先于评审交接。
五个角色交接顺序明确且可机器寻址。
planner.committed_summary: 提交“贡献流程清单”的五角色计划、证据边界、“自动推送代码”门禁和下游交付标识。

tool_policy.goal: 在不扩大“流程章节与命令允许表”访问范围的前提下，为“贡献流程清单”授权或拒绝具体工具动作。
tool_policy.instruction: 评估“贡献流程清单”所需动作，记录允许列表动作或任务特定的无需工具理由。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 默认禁止联网、provider 请求和沙箱外路径。
不得绕过“自动推送代码”门禁。
工具结果必须先提交为证据，构建角色才能消费。
tool_policy.evidence_intent: 把授权结论绑定到“流程章节与命令允许表”，拒绝未声明证据源。
tool_policy.tool_action: 无需工具；仅生成说明
acceptance_criteria: 结论写明精确动作或精确的无需工具理由。
结论写明允许的读写边界。
结论保留该检查：输出不包含发布命令。
tool_policy.committed_summary: 提交“贡献流程清单”的最小权限工具结论、沙箱边界、回执规则和拒绝原因。

frontend_gen.goal: 只使用已授权证据，构建“贡献流程清单”。
frontend_gen.instruction: 在规划和工具策略承诺到位后，生成“贡献流程清单”及其规范JSON契约。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 只使用已提交的“流程章节与命令允许表”。
不得掩盖或静默修复“自动推送代码”。
未决状态必须显式且确定。
frontend_gen.evidence_intent: 只关注构建“贡献流程清单”所需的角色可见证据，忽略其他上下文。
frontend_gen.tool_action: 只允许使用先前精确授权的动作；否则无工具构建。
acceptance_criteria: 验证先于评审交接。
输出不包含发布命令。
输出契约明确“贡献流程清单”及该场景的未决状态。
frontend_gen.committed_summary: 提交“贡献流程清单”的规范字段、证据引用和未决条件。

frontend_review.goal: 审查“贡献流程清单”的证据忠实度、确定性行为及“自动推送代码”失败模式。
frontend_review.instruction: 对照规划承诺和授权证据审查“贡献流程清单”，返回发现项与通过/修改结论。只输出简洁、可审计摘要与规范JSON，不暴露隐藏思维链。
constraints: 审查阶段不得改写产物。
每个发现必须追溯到“流程章节与命令允许表”或已提交契约字段。
缺少来源绑定必须作为阻塞项。
frontend_review.evidence_intent: 使用已提交产物和允许的来源引用验证：验证先于评审交接。
frontend_review.tool_action: 不新增工具动作；只审查已提交产物和现有回执。
acceptance_criteria: 审查明确验证：验证先于评审交接。
审查明确验证：输出不包含发布命令。
每个阻塞发现都有确定的修订目标。
frontend_review.committed_summary: 提交“贡献流程清单”的审查结论、已检标准、证据关联发现和必改项。

PASS 必须满足：验证先于评审交接。

bundles.task_text: 从档案数字化命名规范中依次提取批次码、页序、版本后缀和冲突处理。
constraints: 只使用“规范章节与格式样例”，不得补写缺失事实。
生成“命名规则JSON”并保留未决状态。
把“把样例当真实标识”视为阻塞校验条件。
acceptance_hints: 规则与样例分开。
冲突后缀遵循页序规则。
返回可审计摘要与规范JSON，不输出隐藏思维链。
